title: Printed Task List

posts.author: dodgerblue (Dodgerblue)
posts.cookedHtml: We are looking to print a filtered view of items from a board for our facilities personnel to work from each day; basically a check list. We would like to create a custom printout/document of multiple items based on a filtered view. Any ideas? DocuGen (very buggy) and Export Item to PDF apps don’t fit the bill. This needs to be something simple that the facilities manager can print each day for each team member.
